name: Crockpot Chicken Noodle Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the first four ingredients in a 3 1/2-quart slow cooker in the order listed.
2. Combine salt and the next six ingredients; sprinkle over the vegetables.
3. Add 6 cups water and cover. Cook on low setting for 8 to 10 hours.
4. Remove chicken and bay leaf; add remaining 2 cups water. Stir in noodles and cook, covered, on high setting for 20 minutes.
5. Meanwhile, remove bones from chicken and cut into bite-size pieces. Add to slow cooker and stir to mix.
6. Cook for an additional 15 minutes on the high setting, covered.
